close_reason: Research task with no actionable outcome; close as informational
description: MSRV was bumped from 1.75 to 1.92. Research what new stable Rust features (1.76–1.92) can improve the codebase: e.g. LazyLock (1.80), precise capturing (1.82), new trait impls, stabilized APIs, edition2024 idioms. File sub-issues for each actionable improvement.
title: Research Rust 1.92 features to leverage after MSRV bump
